summary: The user sought guidance on designing a successful mobile application for e-commerce businesses, including marketing strategies and user feedback collection. The session covered essential steps for app development, tips for effective marketing, and tools for gathering user feedback, with the user deciding to try Apptentive for in-app surveys.
facts: The user is designing a mobile application for e-commerce businesses. The user plans to use Apptentive for conducting in-app feedback surveys. The user is interested in marketing strategies for their e-commerce mobile app. The user is looking for ways to encourage users to provide feedback on their app. The user asked about the frequency of app updates to maintain relevance. The user inquired about valuable types of feedback to receive from users. The user received advice on leveraging social media channels for app promotion. The user was advised to offer user incentives for downloading and using the app. The user was informed about the importance of responding to user feedback in a timely manner. The user was given tips on optimizing their app for app stores. The user was advised to conduct usability testing to gain feedback on their app.
